description: Create a custom LCIA method named 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)' by duplicating the 'TRACI 2.1' method. If the base method is not present, import it from '~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip'. Update the characterization factors for 'Methane' (Emission to air) to 29.8 and 'Nitrous oxide' (Emission to air) to 273. Document the updates in a log file at '~/LCA_Results/ar6_update_log.txt'.
